narrative:
Green Creek A (precinct in Sandusky County) has 494 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.1 percentage points.
